# Linking Conventions

A real link to [[Composting Basics]] belongs in prose.

Inline code such as `[[Not A Link]]` must never be counted.

```text
A fenced block with [[Also Not A Link]] stays out of the graph.
- [fact] fenced observations are ignored too #ignored
```

One more real reference: [[Soil pH]] closes the note.
